[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / speed

# Method: speed()

```ts
speed(rate): this;
```

Set playback speed.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `rate` | `number` | Playback rate (`1.0` is normal speed). |

## Returns

`this`
